title: polyspora obtusa
intro: Polyspora obtusa, also known as the Red Coral Mushroom, is a species of fungus that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Polyspora obtusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. The herbal preparations of Polyspora obtusa include tea, tincture, and extract, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
